# ElicitationForm.IsBooleanSchema method

Returns `true` when *value* is a valid `BooleanSchema` — a JSON object whose `type` is exactly `"boolean"` (spec §20.4, R-20.4-c).

```csharp
public static bool IsBooleanSchema(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate property schema. |

## Return Value

`true` when a valid boolean schema.
